reviews_data.review_text: Better for beers than food

This has become one of our go-to lunch spots each month, and it’s easy to see why. The owner is often on-site and clearly takes pride in the business, which shows in both the food and the atmosphere. The staff is welcoming and always happy to suggest something new to try.

Since opening, they’ve expanded their menu in a thoughtful way, and everything we’ve tried has been outstanding. The Mezzo Market salad is light and fresh, while the pizzas are flavorful with a perfectly crispy crust—I especially appreciate that they use the small cup-style pepperoni. The Khachapuri is a must-try: it’s served hot, and mixing the egg yolk into the cheese before dipping the bread is absolutely delicious. On weekends, we love stopping in for the burek during brunch.

Service is casual but efficient—if you’d like full service, sit at the bar. Otherwise, you can order at the bar or counter, and the staff will bring your food to you.

The space itself is comfortable and inviting. The covered outdoor patio has plenty of seating, along with heaters for cooler months. Inside, there’s a small selection of wine and beer to go, as well as house-made dishes available in the fridge and freezer. The lentil soup is especially worth picking up. They also have a small coffee bar with a few dessert options, and the coffee is always hot, fresh, and delicious.

Parking is a bit limited, but there is street parking available on Mecklenburg Ave just past the restaurant. The bathrooms are clean and well-appointed, which is always a plus.

Overall, it’s a consistently great experience, and we’ll definitely keep coming back.

We came in tonight and ordered a Cubano sandwich and it was awful. The price for that and fries was 26$s plus two drinks.
The bread was so soggy and the meat was flavorless all you could taste was the mustard they used that burned your mouth because it tasted like spoon fulls of horse radish sauce.
Also fries were decent just way salty.
Pretty sad this place didn’t have better food. Love supporting local but 👎

We shared a birthday get together with our daughter, her partner, and her friends in this hopping Plaza Midwood mainstay.  The “Cheers” type atmosphere made this Friday night special, with a number of families with small children in attendance.  Smiles abounded and it was obvious that MM has found the combination of atmosphere, offerings, and food quality that the neighborhood wants.  We ordered a couple of pizzas, reasonably priced, a 24” meat lovers, and a 16” cheese, that fed 8 of us.  The pizzas were fresh and of average quality.  As a Chicago native, I may be biased, but still looking for an “A” pizza in the Charlotte area.  MM offers a variety of cocktails, craft beers, wines, and other entrees. The staff is super friendly and although the outside area was too small for those who wanted to use it the servers squeezed their way through.  Real china, instead of the paper plates so common nowadays were a welcome feature.  MM is worth a trip; decent food that won’t break the bank.  Bring your kids or grandkids and enjoy the outdoor play area as a bonus.
Excellent food, service and environment! Our favorite neighborhood spot for our family and friends.

Coming from a less diverse area in NC, finding a place that satisfies my palette is like finding honey in a rock.
The food was tasty. A little on the pricey side imo but the creativity of the menu makes it worth checking this place out.
Mezzo is fantastic and our typical go to any time of the week. The staff are outstanding and make great cocktails. The food is always great as well. Such a great addition to the neighborhood.
I ate the entire bowl… and felt great afterwards! You can tell there is a lot of thought and intention that goes into their food.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Great spot. Bring the family for brunch. The BEC pastry was great. Kids loved the pizza.
Food is so good. Music 🎶 was a bit loud for afternoon wine and pizza. We love this place.

That feeling when a place deserves praise but you kind of don't want to give it, because then it will get too busy and you won't be able to get a table... We went for brunch, and everything was excellent -- the food, the service, and the atmosphere. It's a nice "neighborhood" feel with an Eastern Mediterranean menu that feels unique but accessible. You can see the prices yourself  -- they feel a little bit high, but I think that's just the reality of eating out in 2026. We're looking forward to trying out dinner one night soon.

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
We’ve been coming to Mezzo Market since they opened, and it’s become one of our favorite spots to visit with our kids and friends. The staff, manager, and owners are always incredibly friendly and welcoming, which makes every visit feel special. The food, coffee, wine and drinks are consistently great — fresh, delicious, and thoughtfully prepared.

They truly took it up a notch when we hosted our 4-year-old’s birthday party on the patio. Everything was seamless, the atmosphere was perfect for both kids and adults, and our friends and family had such a wonderful time. It was the ideal setting for a celebration — relaxed, fun, and beautifully done.

The outdoor backyard area is amazing — the soccer goals are perfect for kids to run around, and there’s plenty of space for dogs too. It’s such a rare find to have a place where both adults and kids can genuinely enjoy themselves.

So grateful to have this gem in the neighborhood. Highly recommend! 🎉⚽️🥂

The pictures look like large servings, but the plates are tiny, just FYI - it's great for brunch! The food is good, fresh ingredients, but all the flavor of someone who thinks mayo is spicy. I've been to Greece, Italy, Turkye, all over the Mediterranean and the flavors are amazing! This place has the main items but lacked the flavor.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you N Fer!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Everything is great here!
Some of the grains in the bowl were very raw. Like crack a tooth raw. The chicken add on for the bowls was also laughable small for $6 and very dry.
Great place to visit.

New Hidden Neighborhood Jewel 🎯
Try the Sausage and grape pizza and thank me later. Delicious!! This is a great neighborhood-friendly anytime spot.
Love that my boys can go there after school to grab an snack they love the fries and scones, and the chicken noodle soup was good as well
Get the mushroom pie! Delicious! They make their own dough which you don’t normally see at a market-the food is fantastic and the staff feels like family.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text:
Mezzo Market is a true gem in Charlotte! The food is absolutely delicious and clearly made with fresh, high-quality ingredients. I had the Chicken Piccata, which was perfectly prepared and full of bright, balanced flavor. Others in our group ordered the Cubano sandwich, lentil soup, and a grain bowl — every dish was a hit and beautifully presented.

They also have a well-curated selection of wines, Italian cookies, and a fantastic variety of take-home meals. You can stock up on lasagna, meatballs, sauces, soups, and fresh veggies — all prepared with the same care and quality as the dine-in dishes.

Highly recommend for a casual lunch or dinner, or grabbing gourmet meals to enjoy at home!
Great food and drink, great service, and on the night we went, great entertainment!
Amazing place to eat and hangout. Food is outstanding. All of the staff are fantastic people and Georgi is the best! Highly recommend this for anyone and everyone.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: So far… meat lovers pizza, creamy risotto side, Cubano, grilled chicken sandwich, fancy cocktails and cold 🍺. 10 out 10. Go here. Ask for Chris.
This place is so good. Everything was delicious, can't wait to come back several times until I've tried the whole menu.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Taylor!  We love the grains bowls too - we hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great vibes and delicious grain bowls! Come check it out. Great to have a nice new place on The Plaza!
Love this place, but taco was so dry and not good as usually today . Still will come again because everything else is good and was before

Plaza

The food was delicious.   However,  $30.32 for (2) sandwiches.  No chips.  No sides.  No drinks.......nahhhhhh.  $7.00 lunch meat sandwich at best.  EVERYTHING seemed waaayyyy overpriced.   We shall see.....🤷🏻‍♂️
This is a hidden gem! The chorizo pizza is amazing and the staff is always super friendly. We love stopping here for a beer and pizza! Highly recommend.

They did an absolutely amazing job with the old crackmart! Georgie slayed it. Drinks were amazing, customer service was in full effect. Pizza was made by a professional who knows how to work a pizza oven. Definitely recommend this hidden neighborhood gem!
Everything is fabulous. I looooooove their Cubans and Espresso Martinis. Don’t leave without the martini, trust.

Grabbed some lunch with a friend and was really impressed with the variety. They have coffee, pasties, packaged meals, pizza, sandwiches and grain bowls. The grain bowl I got was super fresh and delicious!

We stopped by for a casual lunch and Mezzo Market did not disappoint!

The bartender was super friendly and gave us top notch service.
We ordered a summer salad, sausage and grape (yes, grape!) pizza and a chai latte. Everything was great - the pizza was unique and tasty and the chai latte might be my new fav in Charlotte!

Can't wait to go back and enjoy their selection of wine!

A strange place. Counter service, but you order some things at one small counter, others at the separate well-stocked bar. There's a section of coolers with a large selection of bottled beverages, and a sort of mini wine shop. It may be the only restaurant in NC that doesn't serve iced tea. The folks were friendly and the food was pretty good, but nothing to rave about.
Small spot with big flavors. We’ll be back again soon to try more.

Mezzo Market took by surprise !! Such an awesome environment with such a friendly atmosphere. Service was attentive and punctual.  The food was very much more than I expected.  So delicious !! I most definitely recommend Mezzo Market to everyone . Absolutely Awesome!!!
The most amazing food!! The braised pork cheeks literally melt in your mouth. Deserts are amazing. Staff is wonderful!!!
Very good food.   Busy - but service was fast.

Thank you. Google maps when I looked for Mediterranean in this area. Super cute Vibe, a decent Moscow mule mocktail and peach Bellini and the lamb shank sandwich was very good! The bartender was personable and gave good recommendations. We'll be back!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: I had the chicken sandwich. Perfect stomach filler and the pesto was spot on. Great place to kick back for drinks, food and chatter.
Pizza was good

Our first time here. They were definitely operating on all cylinders. I took no food or beverage photos but …the food was delicious and the beers were cold. Our group of five enjoyed a mix of pizza and street tacos. A wonderful addition to the neighborhood and the food scene in Charlotte and they did not disappoint. Be sure to check out the pastry case, wine selection and a delicious cocktail from the fully stocked bar. There is both inside and outside seating for your dining pleasure. ENJOY!

reviews_data.review_text: We stopped by this place after reading rave reviews  on different newsletters, plus we ride by it frequently on The Plaza. We went mid afternoon on a Thursday, and it was nice and quiet. The menu is not overwhelming with great healthy choices and pizza available. We got the roasted veggie salad and tabouleh salad. You can add a protein but we opted to get them as is. The roasted veggie salad had lovely beets, kale and sweet potatoes with crunchy pistachios. Our servers/bartenders the Chris's were very personable and gave great recommendations. The bar has ample room, local beers on tap, wine and spirits. Good selection of wine to go, ready-made food to take home to heat up. Lovey space indoor and outdoor. They probably get very busy after work hours and weekends with neighborhood folks. Good sized parking lot and also on street neighborhood parking. We will definitely be back, had a great time.
The food is incredible—exactly what Plaza Midwood has been missing! I’ve been twice now, and it’s consistently delicious. The staff is also fantastic—friendly and attentive.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Raquel we're so glad you stopped in and thank you for the great review!  We look forward to your next visit!

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is super cute! Part bodega and part bar/restaurant.

We sat at the bar and enjoyed the pork cheeks and a pizza. The pork cheeks are soooo good!

There is a side patio for outdoor dining when the weather is nice.

There is a small parking lot in front that holds about 10 cars.

Will definitely be back to try more menu items!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Mike - thank you for stopping in to see us!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I was so happy to see Tabouli Salad on the menu. Jo got the roasted vegetable grain bowl.  Both were excellent. We sat at the bar.  Chris our bartender let Jo sample two white wines before deciding. I got a beer.  Very chill place. They have “grab and go” food. Appreciate the spacious parking lot.  Will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're so glad you enjoyed your meal!  Thank you for stopping in - we look forward to serving you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: My girlfriends and I decided have a dinner here after our meeting. What a great place. We were promptly greeted by a gentleman at the bar. I loved my lamb sandwich! We sat outside at a large community table and enjoyed our meal while chatting.
We shared a pizza and it was delicious 😋

reviews_data.owner_answer: Alyssa thank you taking the time to provide feedback on your experience with us and with Kris!  We can't wait to serve you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Mezzo Market is sooo good! They have a great atmosphere inside and outside. Kris knows his stuff and recommended lots of food and it was all delicious! The chicken sandwich is to die for! The salads are awesome too! This is a new spot for me, I will be back over and over. Great service and amazing food! :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Laura - the veggie sandwich is one of our favorites!! Thanks so much for taking the time to post a review - we look forward to your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: I got a veggie sandwich today with grilled sliced vegetables, goat cheese, and hot homemade bread. It was DELICIOUS.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Graham - thank you for providing feedback on your visit.  We are so sorry to hear that your experience was anything less than stellar.   We would appreciate the opportunity to further discuss your visit with us.  Please feel free to reach out to info@mezzomarketclt.com.
reviews_data.review_text: Not overly impressed during my first visit. Food was somewhat bland for my liking. Bakery case was fairly empty. No rewards or loyalty program was available. It's sounds like they don't make their own baked goods. Service was fast and friendly. Atmosphere was alrighty then. There was only one parking space when I arrived. The parking lot is pretty tight overall. I'll arrive by bicycle if I return, but spending $40 on a plate of spring mix (small house salad) and blandwich is more than likely not in the future plan. They do have prepared family meals to heat at home with love, so maybe this place could potentially come in clutch someday if they're still around.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Tobi - thank you for visiting us and providing your honest feedback.  We are working very hard to keep our menu pricing down while providing the freshest and highest quality ingredients.  We would love to discuss this with your further.  Please feel free to reach out to us at info@mezzomarketclt.com.
reviews_data.review_text: I love that this place opened in Plaza Midwood.  Great venue with indoor/outdoor seating and good food.  I found it to be a little pricey for what you get (ex: sandwiches don’t come with any sides).  That’s the only reason I didn’t give it five stars.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Susan - thank you for visiting us and taking the time to post a review!  We can't wait to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful, fun and clean place with a great location. Our group had pizza and the bowls for lunch - both excellent.   Staff was very accommodating. We will definitely be back.

reviews_data.review_text: Great place for family or hanging out with friends, wonderful food and large selection at the bar.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Tyler - we're thrilled to hear you had a great experience!  Thank you for stopping in and taking the time to provide feedback!  Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Very excited that Mezzo Market opened down the street. We finally went later on a Sunday evening and it has a really great vibe. We love that. They also have food to go and a case that had lots of different desserts. The bar was both indoor and outdoor. You order food either at the counter or if you’re sitting at the bar. Table service was not available which we thought was a great idea. So we had 2 different tabs. One for food and one for drinks while sitting at bar. Pizza and 3 trio dip was delicious. Draft beer and Aperol spritz we had as well. Reasonably priced. We will be coming back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Josh - thank you for the detailed review!  We greatly appreciate your business and look forward to serving you again soon!

reviews_data.review_text:
When you find a place that hits on all cylinders, food, service and atmosphere, you mark it as a favorite and you return often. This is that place.
The pizza is absolutely incredible. They make a clean dough using a 00 and sauce and cheese is well paired.

This place is a gem on The Plaza!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Melvin - we're so glad you enjoyed your visit with us!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
Wonderful service and vibe.  Was driving by and saw this place and stopped on a whim.  One of the owners (or possibly the manager?) had a great conversation with me and made a great suggestion on a Vanilla Oat Iced coffee drink that was awesome!  I had two of them.

Also, she suggested the Lamb Shank sandwich (swe pic).  The picture doesn't do it justice.

I look forward to coming back and enjoying the bar and thecool vibe.  There is also an outdoor patio.

reviews_data.owner_answer: EV - thank you for taking the time to post a review!  We love our neighbors and enjoy chatting with you all!  We can't wait to see you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Georgie has got a good thing going here. Authentic food, friendly, come as you are environment. The counter/bar service makes for a relaxed atmosphere. Some fun, unique items on the menu!  Location cannot be beat. A perfect gathering place for the Midwood neighborhood.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Gibb!  We look forward to your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: A must for anyone in the area.  I've been in the NoDa / Plaza Midwood area for over 15 years.  This is the best spot based on food, service atmosphere & price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: HJC - thank you for taking the time to provide your feedback!  We truly appreciate your business and hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Very excited that Mezzo Market opened in Charlotte, NC. I usually give the place about a month to work out all the kinks and I’ve tried to go numerous times but it’s been packed. I finally went later on a weeknight and it has a really great vibe. I love that. There is a bottle shop and you could buy beers and wine bottles. They also have food to go and a case that had lots of different desserts. The space was very inviting. I loved that the bar is both indoor and outdoor. The bathrooms were super clean and the service was fantastic. My friend and I sat at the bar. I ordered the lamb sandwich and the meat pizza- both were pretty good. I thought they were priced reasonably as well. They also had a pretty great drink menu and lots of wine by the glass and by the bottle.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jackson!  We are keeping a seat warm for your next visit :)  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: My new favorite spot. 10/10

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Joe!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Lamb sandwich>>>>

reviews_data.owner_answer: Stefanie - thank you for the kind words!  We are so glad you had a great experience.  We look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a good new spot in Plaza Midwood/Villa Heights/Country Club Heights neighborhood. The owner took an old corner store and remodeled it to a market/bar/restaurant. We ordered a sausage and grape pizza and it was such a good surprise, so yammi! The flavors in the grain bowl went to well together and the pizza was amazing! Give that place a try, definitely will add value to our neighborhood.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Tony!  We are so glad you had a great experience.  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great addition to the neighborhood. Staff was friendly and pizza was delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Scott!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
I was fortunate to get invited to their soft opening. At that event I tried a slice of pizza and it was excellent! Then yesterday, my wife and I got a take-out salad, with beef and it was excellent too. The beef was really flavorful and tender.

As a longtime resident of Plaza Midwood, I'm glad to see Djordje and Carol putting so much care in restoring and updating this space. And given the food is so good, I'm sure it will be a neighborhood favorite!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Cat - thank you for taking the time to provide feedback.  As a new restaurant we've hit a few speed bumps but we are working hard to perfect things.  We're sorry that your experience was less than stellar.  We hope you'll come back and give us the opportunity to make things right.
reviews_data.review_text: Just give them a minute to work out the kinks.. they have recently opened and it's a fairly small space. There is decent seating outside with a grassy patch for kids to run around. Noise level was pretty high. They already had staff call out so we had to wait 10 minutes just to order our food. The bartenders were working really hard and our drinks were good. Two of our table mates had finished their food by the time our pizza came out. They do have a cold case where you can pick up premade food. Again you may just want to give them a few weeks to work out the kinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Henry!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: … To serve chicken this good should be illegal. I can’t say enough good things about this place, from the vibes to the food, you will not be disappointed! This restaurant is amazing, and I hope more and more people find out about it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Chris!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great edition to the neighborhood. Friendly staff. Nice outdoor seating with an open air outdoor bar. I had the cauliflower grain bowl with chicken thigh. Good wine selections as well. It’s a great spot. You should check it out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Rasmus - thanks so much for taking the time to post a review.  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a fun place in Plaza Midwood! Great simple menu, good drinks, delicious pastries, and a nice selection of premade meals to finish at home. Service was awesome too!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Salvatore!  We're so glad you enjoyed your visit!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I love the atmosphere of this place! Staff was very friendly and the food was delicious. I ordered the Roasted Vegetable Grain Bowl and it was the perfect mix of quality meets healthy. Paired the meal with a delicious cup of coffee. The latte was beautifully presented and the coffee tasted fresh and was perfect. Will return here!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Maggie! More desserts to come soon!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Been waiting for Mezzo to open and it did not disappoint!! Forever a fan on Intermezzo and living down the street now from Mezzo will be DANGEROUS. 15/10 on the desserts and killing it through their opening week, can’t wait to support another local Plaza Midwood restaurant that is so deserving <3 (The Lemon Donut was too good with lemon filling almost a hybrid between donut and lemon bar)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you neighbor!  We look forward to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Truly enjoyed our first of many walks across the street for yummy dinner/cocktails!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Lyra - thank you for the review!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Food and atmosphere are excellent. We live a block away and have a new favorite destination in Plaza!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Colby - thank you so much for taking the time to post a review.  We truly appreciate you!
reviews_data.review_text: We have been anxiously awaiting the opening of Mezzo and it was worth the wait! This place is such a vibe and this neighborhood needed this. In addition to amazing dine in food, they also have coolers with take home meats, soups, etc which I know will be a huge hit for our family weeknight meals! The staff was so friendly and honestly we’re crushing it on day two of being open! We can’t wait to go back! We got the kale salad, street tacos & the potatoes. So so so good!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Larken - thank you so much for the review!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great addition to Plaza Midwood in a very thoughtfully renovated/adapted old convenience store, where the new owners even saved/restored the vintage walk-in cooler. If you love Intermezzo, you're going to love this place too (the owner is one of the brothers from Intermezzo, which is one of the most underrated neighborhood spots in Charlotte). Great pizza, but so much more than just pizza. Delicious cocktails along with good beer/wine selection for drinking there or taking home. Take and bake style food options for at-home dining available as well. They've also added a great covered patio onto the building with a roll-up garage door window where you can sit at the backside of the indoor bar from the outdoor patio. Overall, this is the kind of place I'm likely going to find myself at A LOT.

reviews_data.review_text: Better for beers than food

This has become one of our go-to lunch spots each month, and it’s easy to see why. The owner is often on-site and clearly takes pride in the business, which shows in both the food and the atmosphere. The staff is welcoming and always happy to suggest something new to try.

Since opening, they’ve expanded their menu in a thoughtful way, and everything we’ve tried has been outstanding. The Mezzo Market salad is light and fresh, while the pizzas are flavorful with a perfectly crispy crust—I especially appreciate that they use the small cup-style pepperoni. The Khachapuri is a must-try: it’s served hot, and mixing the egg yolk into the cheese before dipping the bread is absolutely delicious. On weekends, we love stopping in for the burek during brunch.

Service is casual but efficient—if you’d like full service, sit at the bar. Otherwise, you can order at the bar or counter, and the staff will bring your food to you.

The space itself is comfortable and inviting. The covered outdoor patio has plenty of seating, along with heaters for cooler months. Inside, there’s a small selection of wine and beer to go, as well as house-made dishes available in the fridge and freezer. The lentil soup is especially worth picking up. They also have a small coffee bar with a few dessert options, and the coffee is always hot, fresh, and delicious.

Parking is a bit limited, but there is street parking available on Mecklenburg Ave just past the restaurant. The bathrooms are clean and well-appointed, which is always a plus.

Overall, it’s a consistently great experience, and we’ll definitely keep coming back.

We came in tonight and ordered a Cubano sandwich and it was awful. The price for that and fries was 26$s plus two drinks.
The bread was so soggy and the meat was flavorless all you could taste was the mustard they used that burned your mouth because it tasted like spoon fulls of horse radish sauce.
Also fries were decent just way salty.
Pretty sad this place didn’t have better food. Love supporting local but 👎

We shared a birthday get together with our daughter, her partner, and her friends in this hopping Plaza Midwood mainstay.  The “Cheers” type atmosphere made this Friday night special, with a number of families with small children in attendance.  Smiles abounded and it was obvious that MM has found the combination of atmosphere, offerings, and food quality that the neighborhood wants.  We ordered a couple of pizzas, reasonably priced, a 24” meat lovers, and a 16” cheese, that fed 8 of us.  The pizzas were fresh and of average quality.  As a Chicago native, I may be biased, but still looking for an “A” pizza in the Charlotte area.  MM offers a variety of cocktails, craft beers, wines, and other entrees. The staff is super friendly and although the outside area was too small for those who wanted to use it the servers squeezed their way through.  Real china, instead of the paper plates so common nowadays were a welcome feature.  MM is worth a trip; decent food that won’t break the bank.  Bring your kids or grandkids and enjoy the outdoor play area as a bonus.
Excellent food, service and environment! Our favorite neighborhood spot for our family and friends.

Coming from a less diverse area in NC, finding a place that satisfies my palette is like finding honey in a rock.
The food was tasty. A little on the pricey side imo but the creativity of the menu makes it worth checking this place out.
Mezzo is fantastic and our typical go to any time of the week. The staff are outstanding and make great cocktails. The food is always great as well. Such a great addition to the neighborhood.
I ate the entire bowl… and felt great afterwards! You can tell there is a lot of thought and intention that goes into their food.

reviews_data.review_text: Great spot. Bring the family for brunch. The BEC pastry was great. Kids loved the pizza.
Food is so good. Music 🎶 was a bit loud for afternoon wine and pizza. We love this place.

That feeling when a place deserves praise but you kind of don't want to give it, because then it will get too busy and you won't be able to get a table... We went for brunch, and everything was excellent -- the food, the service, and the atmosphere. It's a nice "neighborhood" feel with an Eastern Mediterranean menu that feels unique but accessible. You can see the prices yourself  -- they feel a little bit high, but I think that's just the reality of eating out in 2026. We're looking forward to trying out dinner one night soon.

review_questions.null: Vegetarian options, Parking, Kid-friendliness, Wheelchair accessibility

reviews_data.review_text:
We’ve been coming to Mezzo Market since they opened, and it’s become one of our favorite spots to visit with our kids and friends. The staff, manager, and owners are always incredibly friendly and welcoming, which makes every visit feel special. The food, coffee, wine and drinks are consistently great — fresh, delicious, and thoughtfully prepared.

They truly took it up a notch when we hosted our 4-year-old’s birthday party on the patio. Everything was seamless, the atmosphere was perfect for both kids and adults, and our friends and family had such a wonderful time. It was the ideal setting for a celebration — relaxed, fun, and beautifully done.

The outdoor backyard area is amazing — the soccer goals are perfect for kids to run around, and there’s plenty of space for dogs too. It’s such a rare find to have a place where both adults and kids can genuinely enjoy themselves.

So grateful to have this gem in the neighborhood. Highly recommend! 🎉⚽️🥂

The pictures look like large servings, but the plates are tiny, just FYI - it's great for brunch! The food is good, fresh ingredients, but all the flavor of someone who thinks mayo is spicy. I've been to Greece, Italy, Turkye, all over the Mediterranean and the flavors are amazing! This place has the main items but lacked the flavor.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you N Fer!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Everything is great here!
Some of the grains in the bowl were very raw. Like crack a tooth raw. The chicken add on for the bowls was also laughable small for $6 and very dry.
Great place to visit.

New Hidden Neighborhood Jewel 🎯
Try the Sausage and grape pizza and thank me later. Delicious!! This is a great neighborhood-friendly anytime spot.
Love that my boys can go there after school to grab an snack they love the fries and scones, and the chicken noodle soup was good as well
Get the mushroom pie! Delicious! They make their own dough which you don’t normally see at a market-the food is fantastic and the staff feels like family.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text:
Mezzo Market is a true gem in Charlotte! The food is absolutely delicious and clearly made with fresh, high-quality ingredients. I had the Chicken Piccata, which was perfectly prepared and full of bright, balanced flavor. Others in our group ordered the Cubano sandwich, lentil soup, and a grain bowl — every dish was a hit and beautifully presented.

They also have a well-curated selection of wines, Italian cookies, and a fantastic variety of take-home meals. You can stock up on lasagna, meatballs, sauces, soups, and fresh veggies — all prepared with the same care and quality as the dine-in dishes.

Highly recommend for a casual lunch or dinner, or grabbing gourmet meals to enjoy at home!
Great food and drink, great service, and on the night we went, great entertainment!
Amazing place to eat and hangout. Food is outstanding. All of the staff are fantastic people and Georgi is the best! Highly recommend this for anyone and everyone.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: So far… meat lovers pizza, creamy risotto side, Cubano, grilled chicken sandwich, fancy cocktails and cold 🍺. 10 out 10. Go here. Ask for Chris.
This place is so good. Everything was delicious, can't wait to come back several times until I've tried the whole menu.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Taylor!  We love the grains bowls too - we hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great vibes and delicious grain bowls! Come check it out. Great to have a nice new place on The Plaza!
Love this place, but taco was so dry and not good as usually today . Still will come again because everything else is good and was before

Plaza

The food was delicious.   However,  $30.32 for (2) sandwiches.  No chips.  No sides.  No drinks.......nahhhhhh.  $7.00 lunch meat sandwich at best.  EVERYTHING seemed waaayyyy overpriced.   We shall see.....🤷🏻‍♂️
This is a hidden gem! The chorizo pizza is amazing and the staff is always super friendly. We love stopping here for a beer and pizza! Highly recommend.

They did an absolutely amazing job with the old crackmart! Georgie slayed it. Drinks were amazing, customer service was in full effect. Pizza was made by a professional who knows how to work a pizza oven. Definitely recommend this hidden neighborhood gem!
Everything is fabulous. I looooooove their Cubans and Espresso Martinis. Don’t leave without the martini, trust.

Grabbed some lunch with a friend and was really impressed with the variety. They have coffee, pasties, packaged meals, pizza, sandwiches and grain bowls. The grain bowl I got was super fresh and delicious!

We stopped by for a casual lunch and Mezzo Market did not disappoint!

The bartender was super friendly and gave us top notch service.
We ordered a summer salad, sausage and grape (yes, grape!) pizza and a chai latte. Everything was great - the pizza was unique and tasty and the chai latte might be my new fav in Charlotte!

Can't wait to go back and enjoy their selection of wine!

A strange place. Counter service, but you order some things at one small counter, others at the separate well-stocked bar. There's a section of coolers with a large selection of bottled beverages, and a sort of mini wine shop. It may be the only restaurant in NC that doesn't serve iced tea. The folks were friendly and the food was pretty good, but nothing to rave about.
Small spot with big flavors. We’ll be back again soon to try more.

Mezzo Market took by surprise !! Such an awesome environment with such a friendly atmosphere. Service was attentive and punctual.  The food was very much more than I expected.  So delicious !! I most definitely recommend Mezzo Market to everyone . Absolutely Awesome!!!
The most amazing food!! The braised pork cheeks literally melt in your mouth. Deserts are amazing. Staff is wonderful!!!
Very good food.   Busy - but service was fast.

Thank you. Google maps when I looked for Mediterranean in this area. Super cute Vibe, a decent Moscow mule mocktail and peach Bellini and the lamb shank sandwich was very good! The bartender was personable and gave good recommendations. We'll be back!

review_questions.Parking options: Free parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: I had the chicken sandwich. Perfect stomach filler and the pesto was spot on. Great place to kick back for drinks, food and chatter.
Pizza was good

Our first time here. They were definitely operating on all cylinders. I took no food or beverage photos but …the food was delicious and the beers were cold. Our group of five enjoyed a mix of pizza and street tacos. A wonderful addition to the neighborhood and the food scene in Charlotte and they did not disappoint. Be sure to check out the pastry case, wine selection and a delicious cocktail from the fully stocked bar. There is both inside and outside seating for your dining pleasure. ENJOY!

reviews_data.review_text: We stopped by this place after reading rave reviews  on different newsletters, plus we ride by it frequently on The Plaza. We went mid afternoon on a Thursday, and it was nice and quiet. The menu is not overwhelming with great healthy choices and pizza available. We got the roasted veggie salad and tabouleh salad. You can add a protein but we opted to get them as is. The roasted veggie salad had lovely beets, kale and sweet potatoes with crunchy pistachios. Our servers/bartenders the Chris's were very personable and gave great recommendations. The bar has ample room, local beers on tap, wine and spirits. Good selection of wine to go, ready-made food to take home to heat up. Lovey space indoor and outdoor. They probably get very busy after work hours and weekends with neighborhood folks. Good sized parking lot and also on street neighborhood parking. We will definitely be back, had a great time.
The food is incredible—exactly what Plaza Midwood has been missing! I’ve been twice now, and it’s consistently delicious. The staff is also fantastic—friendly and attentive.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Raquel we're so glad you stopped in and thank you for the great review!  We look forward to your next visit!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text:
This place is super cute! Part bodega and part bar/restaurant.

We sat at the bar and enjoyed the pork cheeks and a pizza. The pork cheeks are soooo good!

There is a side patio for outdoor dining when the weather is nice.

There is a small parking lot in front that holds about 10 cars.

Will definitely be back to try more menu items!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Mike - thank you for stopping in to see us!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I was so happy to see Tabouli Salad on the menu. Jo got the roasted vegetable grain bowl.  Both were excellent. We sat at the bar.  Chris our bartender let Jo sample two white wines before deciding. I got a beer.  Very chill place. They have “grab and go” food. Appreciate the spacious parking lot.  Will definitely be back.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're so glad you enjoyed your meal!  Thank you for stopping in - we look forward to serving you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: My girlfriends and I decided have a dinner here after our meeting. What a great place. We were promptly greeted by a gentleman at the bar. I loved my lamb sandwich! We sat outside at a large community table and enjoyed our meal while chatting.
We shared a pizza and it was delicious 😋

reviews_data.owner_answer: Alyssa thank you taking the time to provide feedback on your experience with us and with Kris!  We can't wait to serve you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Mezzo Market is sooo good! They have a great atmosphere inside and outside. Kris knows his stuff and recommended lots of food and it was all delicious! The chicken sandwich is to die for! The salads are awesome too! This is a new spot for me, I will be back over and over. Great service and amazing food! :)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Laura - the veggie sandwich is one of our favorites!! Thanks so much for taking the time to post a review - we look forward to your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: I got a veggie sandwich today with grilled sliced vegetables, goat cheese, and hot homemade bread. It was DELICIOUS.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Graham - thank you for providing feedback on your visit.  We are so sorry to hear that your experience was anything less than stellar.   We would appreciate the opportunity to further discuss your visit with us.  Please feel free to reach out to info@mezzomarketclt.com.
reviews_data.review_text: Not overly impressed during my first visit. Food was somewhat bland for my liking. Bakery case was fairly empty. No rewards or loyalty program was available. It's sounds like they don't make their own baked goods. Service was fast and friendly. Atmosphere was alrighty then. There was only one parking space when I arrived. The parking lot is pretty tight overall. I'll arrive by bicycle if I return, but spending $40 on a plate of spring mix (small house salad) and blandwich is more than likely not in the future plan. They do have prepared family meals to heat at home with love, so maybe this place could potentially come in clutch someday if they're still around.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Tobi - thank you for visiting us and providing your honest feedback.  We are working very hard to keep our menu pricing down while providing the freshest and highest quality ingredients.  We would love to discuss this with your further.  Please feel free to reach out to us at info@mezzomarketclt.com.
reviews_data.review_text: I love that this place opened in Plaza Midwood.  Great venue with indoor/outdoor seating and good food.  I found it to be a little pricey for what you get (ex: sandwiches don’t come with any sides).  That’s the only reason I didn’t give it five stars.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Susan - thank you for visiting us and taking the time to post a review!  We can't wait to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Beautiful, fun and clean place with a great location. Our group had pizza and the bowls for lunch - both excellent.   Staff was very accommodating. We will definitely be back.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating, Counter seating

reviews_data.review_text: Great place for family or hanging out with friends, wonderful food and large selection at the bar.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Tyler - we're thrilled to hear you had a great experience!  Thank you for stopping in and taking the time to provide feedback!  Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Very excited that Mezzo Market opened down the street. We finally went later on a Sunday evening and it has a really great vibe. We love that. They also have food to go and a case that had lots of different desserts. The bar was both indoor and outdoor. You order food either at the counter or if you’re sitting at the bar. Table service was not available which we thought was a great idea. So we had 2 different tabs. One for food and one for drinks while sitting at bar. Pizza and 3 trio dip was delicious. Draft beer and Aperol spritz we had as well. Reasonably priced. We will be coming back!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Josh - thank you for the detailed review!  We greatly appreciate your business and look forward to serving you again soon!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text:
When you find a place that hits on all cylinders, food, service and atmosphere, you mark it as a favorite and you return often. This is that place.
The pizza is absolutely incredible. They make a clean dough using a 00 and sauce and cheese is well paired.

This place is a gem on The Plaza!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Melvin - we're so glad you enjoyed your visit with us!  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
Wonderful service and vibe.  Was driving by and saw this place and stopped on a whim.  One of the owners (or possibly the manager?) had a great conversation with me and made a great suggestion on a Vanilla Oat Iced coffee drink that was awesome!  I had two of them.

Also, she suggested the Lamb Shank sandwich (swe pic).  The picture doesn't do it justice.

I look forward to coming back and enjoying the bar and thecool vibe.  There is also an outdoor patio.

reviews_data.owner_answer: EV - thank you for taking the time to post a review!  We love our neighbors and enjoy chatting with you all!  We can't wait to see you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Georgie has got a good thing going here. Authentic food, friendly, come as you are environment. The counter/bar service makes for a relaxed atmosphere. Some fun, unique items on the menu!  Location cannot be beat. A perfect gathering place for the Midwood neighborhood.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Gibb!  We look forward to your next visit!
reviews_data.review_text: A must for anyone in the area.  I've been in the NoDa / Plaza Midwood area for over 15 years.  This is the best spot based on food, service atmosphere & price.

reviews_data.owner_answer: HJC - thank you for taking the time to provide your feedback!  We truly appreciate your business and hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Very excited that Mezzo Market opened in Charlotte, NC. I usually give the place about a month to work out all the kinks and I’ve tried to go numerous times but it’s been packed. I finally went later on a weeknight and it has a really great vibe. I love that. There is a bottle shop and you could buy beers and wine bottles. They also have food to go and a case that had lots of different desserts. The space was very inviting. I loved that the bar is both indoor and outdoor. The bathrooms were super clean and the service was fantastic. My friend and I sat at the bar. I ordered the lamb sandwich and the meat pizza- both were pretty good. I thought they were priced reasonably as well. They also had a pretty great drink menu and lots of wine by the glass and by the bottle.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Jackson!  We are keeping a seat warm for your next visit :)  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: My new favorite spot. 10/10

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Joe!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Lamb sandwich>>>>

reviews_data.owner_answer: Stefanie - thank you for the kind words!  We are so glad you had a great experience.  We look forward to seeing you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a good new spot in Plaza Midwood/Villa Heights/Country Club Heights neighborhood. The owner took an old corner store and remodeled it to a market/bar/restaurant. We ordered a sausage and grape pizza and it was such a good surprise, so yammi! The flavors in the grain bowl went to well together and the pizza was amazing! Give that place a try, definitely will add value to our neighborhood.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Tony!  We are so glad you had a great experience.  We look forward to serving you again sometime soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great addition to the neighborhood. Staff was friendly and pizza was delicious!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Scott!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text:
I was fortunate to get invited to their soft opening. At that event I tried a slice of pizza and it was excellent! Then yesterday, my wife and I got a take-out salad, with beef and it was excellent too. The beef was really flavorful and tender.

As a longtime resident of Plaza Midwood, I'm glad to see Djordje and Carol putting so much care in restoring and updating this space. And given the food is so good, I'm sure it will be a neighborhood favorite!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Cat - thank you for taking the time to provide feedback.  As a new restaurant we've hit a few speed bumps but we are working hard to perfect things.  We're sorry that your experience was less than stellar.  We hope you'll come back and give us the opportunity to make things right.
reviews_data.review_text: Just give them a minute to work out the kinks.. they have recently opened and it's a fairly small space. There is decent seating outside with a grassy patch for kids to run around. Noise level was pretty high. They already had staff call out so we had to wait 10 minutes just to order our food. The bartenders were working really hard and our drinks were good. Two of our table mates had finished their food by the time our pizza came out. They do have a cold case where you can pick up premade food. Again you may just want to give them a few weeks to work out the kinks.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Henry!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: … To serve chicken this good should be illegal. I can’t say enough good things about this place, from the vibes to the food, you will not be disappointed! This restaurant is amazing, and I hope more and more people find out about it!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Chris!  We hope to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great edition to the neighborhood. Friendly staff. Nice outdoor seating with an open air outdoor bar. I had the cauliflower grain bowl with chicken thigh. Good wine selections as well. It’s a great spot. You should check it out.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Rasmus - thanks so much for taking the time to post a review.  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Such a fun place in Plaza Midwood! Great simple menu, good drinks, delicious pastries, and a nice selection of premade meals to finish at home. Service was awesome too!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Salvatore!  We're so glad you enjoyed your visit!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: I love the atmosphere of this place! Staff was very friendly and the food was delicious. I ordered the Roasted Vegetable Grain Bowl and it was the perfect mix of quality meets healthy. Paired the meal with a delicious cup of coffee. The latte was beautifully presented and the coffee tasted fresh and was perfect. Will return here!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you Maggie! More desserts to come soon!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Been waiting for Mezzo to open and it did not disappoint!! Forever a fan on Intermezzo and living down the street now from Mezzo will be DANGEROUS. 15/10 on the desserts and killing it through their opening week, can’t wait to support another local Plaza Midwood restaurant that is so deserving <3 (The Lemon Donut was too good with lemon filling almost a hybrid between donut and lemon bar)

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you neighbor!  We look forward to see you again soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Truly enjoyed our first of many walks across the street for yummy dinner/cocktails!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Lyra - thank you for the review!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Food and atmosphere are excellent. We live a block away and have a new favorite destination in Plaza!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Colby - thank you so much for taking the time to post a review.  We truly appreciate you!
reviews_data.review_text: We have been anxiously awaiting the opening of Mezzo and it was worth the wait! This place is such a vibe and this neighborhood needed this. In addition to amazing dine in food, they also have coolers with take home meats, soups, etc which I know will be a huge hit for our family weeknight meals! The staff was so friendly and honestly we’re crushing it on day two of being open! We can’t wait to go back! We got the kale salad, street tacos & the potatoes. So so so good!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Larken - thank you so much for the review!  We hope to see you soon!
reviews_data.review_text: Great addition to Plaza Midwood in a very thoughtfully renovated/adapted old convenience store, where the new owners even saved/restored the vintage walk-in cooler. If you love Intermezzo, you're going to love this place too (the owner is one of the brothers from Intermezzo, which is one of the most underrated neighborhood spots in Charlotte). Great pizza, but so much more than just pizza. Delicious cocktails along with good beer/wine selection for drinking there or taking home. Take and bake style food options for at-home dining available as well. They've also added a great covered patio onto the building with a roll-up garage door window where you can sit at the backside of the indoor bar from the outdoor patio. Overall, this is the kind of place I'm likely going to find myself at A LOT.
